name: bourbon-morelli
description: Site e-commerce pour BOURBON MORELLI - Couture haut de gamme

scripts.server: cd server && set PORT=5002 && node index-dev.js
scripts.client: cd client && npm install && copy package-simple.json package.json && npm start
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install && cd ../server && npm install

author: BOURBON MORELLI
